stages.label: Canonicalize the human directive
stages.humanAttention: Answer intake clarifying questions and ratify the canonical spec before planning.

stages.label: Draft plan, ADR, touch-set, and handoff card
stages.humanAttention: Ratify the plan, ADR draft, touch-set, and handoff before execution.

stages.label: Implement against the declared touch-set from the handoff card
stages.humanAttention: Use ddl pause/resume/abort if implementation drifts, loops, or exceeds scope.

stages.label: Run modern-code-review and contracts pass with compact must-fix output
stages.humanAttention: Inspect high findings; approve only clean review output or send the run back to implement.

stages.label: Stage the PR (no auto-push, Q3)
stages.humanAttention: Review the local diff and delivery report; no agent may push or open the PR unaudited.

stages.label: Index emitted artifacts and refresh the feature index before librarian artifact closure
stages.humanAttention: Verify feature index artifacts; after index is accepted, the generated complete-stage prompt gives the human operator exact archival closure commands.

transitions.humanAttention: Operator delegates the handoff card to intake-analyst.
Canonical spec is ratified or clarified before plan starts.
Plan and touch-set are ratified before coder starts.
Use ddl pause <task-id> to stop at the next safe boundary.
Use ddl resume <task-id> after resolving the blocker.
Use ddl abort <task-id> --reason <text> for failed or superseded runs.
Reviewer receives only the handoff, touch-set, diff, and validation output.
Bounded re-entry; high findings block shipping.
Human should still inspect review output before report/ship.
Delivery report must be useful to the operator, not just a changelog.
No push occurs before human review.
Confirm archive/index state and outbox report.

nextHumanAction: Delegate next-prompt.md to intake-analyst; ratify the emitted spec before advancing to plan.
